brand_identity.name: THE BRIDGE
brand_identity.mission: To build a bridge between cultures, people, and experiences for young travelers.
brand_identity.target_audience: Young travelers (18-30), UK & Europe, Gen Z/Millennials.
brand_identity.archetype: The Explorer x The Jester (Fun, Social, Discovery).

headings.description: Use Syne for all major headings. It is quirky, modern, and memorable. Use tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.description: Clean, geometric, highly readable for long text and UI elements.

accent.description: Use sparingly for 'handwritten' notes, arrows, or emphasis to add a human touch.

usage.background: Use #F4F1DE (Warm Off-White) as the main page background. Avoid sterile #FFFFFF.
usage.text: Use #264653 (Deep Teal) for text instead of black. It's softer and fits the ocean/travel theme.
usage.cta: Use #E76F51 (Burnt Sienna) for primary actions (Book Now).
usage.highlight: Use #E9C46A (Sand Gold) for decorative elements, stars, or highlights.

hero_section.structure: Full viewport height (h-screen). Video background with dark overlay (bg-black/30). Centered or bottom-left aligned massive typography.
elements: CTA: 'Join the Adventure' (Pill shape, blur effect)

concept_section.structure: Asymmetric grid showing different facets of the trip (Surf, Sand, Souks).
concept_section.interaction: Hover reveals details. Parallax scroll effect on images.

experience_cards.style: Polaroid-style cards with tilted angles on hover. Large image area, minimal text.

community_section.structure: Horizontal scrolling marquee of values (Connect • Explore • Live). Below it, a masonry grid of 'traveler moments'.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-bold transition-transform hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-bold

cards.base: bg-white rounded-3xl overflow-hidden border border-border/50 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group
cards.image: aspect-[4/5] object-cover w-full transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-110

navigation.style: Floating glassmorphism header. backdrop-blur-md bg-white/10 border-b border-white/10.

preferences.hero: Text should stagger in from bottom.
preferences.hover: Images should zoom slightly (scale 1.05). Buttons should lift (-y-1).
preferences.transition: Use spring physics for natural feel (stiffness: 100, damping: 20).

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use generic 'Inter' font. Use 'Syne' and 'DM Sans'.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use Deep Teal (#264653).
Ensure all images have alt text for accessibility.
Mobile-first: Ensure touch targets are at least 44px.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons (Sun, Waves, MapPin, Users).
Implement smooth scrolling (lenis recommended if possible, otherwise CSS scroll-behavior: smooth).
